eventPrices.title: Actor start
eventPrices.description: Charged once when the MCP server initializes. Covers session setup and connection overhead.

eventPrices.title: Basic financial data query
eventPrices.description: Forex rates, crypto prices, macro indicators (GDP, CPI, inflation, unemployment), commodity prices, stock indices, SEC EDGAR filings, insider trades, XBRL company facts, US Treasury yield curve + historical yields, FOMC meeting calendar, DeFi TVL (DefiLlama), macro dashboard (VIX/DXY/S&P500/yield curve/Fear&Greed), economic surprise index proxy (US multi-indicator ESI + 10-country ETF proxy), market breadth (Advance/Decline ratio, 52W High/Low, % above 200MA, breadth score), credit spreads ETF proxy (LQD/HYG/EMB vs IEF, credit cycle regime), global equity heatmap (20 country ETFs 1D/1W/1M returns, DM/EM rotation signal), yield curve dynamics (3M/5Y/10Y/30Y Treasury yields, 10Y-2Y/5Y-3M/10Y-3M/30Y-10Y spreads in bps, 30/60-day spread change, curve shape NORMAL/FLAT/INVERTED/HUMPED/STEEP, inversion stats and consecutive inversion days), macro regime monitor (4-axis regime classification: Growth/Inflation/Rates/Liquidity → GOLDILOCKS/OVERHEATING/STAGFLATION/RECESSION/LATE_CYCLE with regime score 0-100 and asset allocation signal), VIX regime monitor (VIX spot level, MA10/20/50, 1-year percentile rank, term structure proxy CONTANGO/BACKWARDATION/FLAT via VXZ, stress regime PANIC/ELEVATED/NORMAL/COMPLACENT, allocation signal), ETF flow tracker (12 ETFs: SPY/QQQ/IWM/GLD/TLT/HYG/XLF/XLE/XLK/XLV/EEM/UUP — OBV slope 10d/30d flow signal STRONG_INFLOW/INFLOW/NEUTRAL/OUTFLOW/STRONG_OUTFLOW, volume regime, 5d/10d/30d returns, cross-asset rotation signal RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/MIXED_FLOWS), market regime composite (5-layer regime detector: VIX + yield curve + credit spreads + market breadth + sector rotation → BULL_MARKET/TRANSITION/CHOPPY_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET with regime score 0-100 and asset allocation guidance), 52W high/low momentum (scans 150-ticker S&P 500 proxy universe across 11 sectors, counts stocks near 52W high/low within 3% threshold, net ratio → momentum regime STRONG_BULL_MOMENTUM/BULLISH_MOMENTUM/NEUTRAL_MOMENTUM/BEARISH_MOMENTUM/STRONG_BEAR_MOMENTUM, sector-level LEADING/NEUTRAL/LAGGING classification, top-5 nearest highs and lows), cross-asset momentum (7 major assets: SPY/QQQ/IWM/TLT/GLD/UUP/BTC-USD — 1W/1M/3M return rankings, 20d momentum, 20d annualized vol, Sharpe proxy, weighted composite rank 1W×30%+1M×40%+3M×30%, Risk-ON/Risk-OFF regime scoring from equity+crypto vs bonds+gold+USD momentum signals, STRONG_RISK_ON/RISK_ON/MIXED/RISK_OFF/STRONG_RISK_OFF with net score -8 to +8, momentum leaders/laggards top-3 each, asset allocation signal), sector ETF vs SPY beta (calculates 1-year OLS beta for all 11 SPDR sector ETFs vs SPY using daily returns, beta label HIGH_BETA/ABOVE_AVERAGE/MARKET_NEUTRAL/BELOW_AVERAGE/LOW_BETA, annualized sector volatility %, SPY correlation, 1W/1M/3M return, sectors ranked by beta, market trend STRONG_BULL/MILD_BULL/SIDEWAYS/MILD_BEAR/STRONG_BEAR, rotation guidance for offensive/defensive positioning, tactical guide for beta-based allocation), fear & greed composite index (7-indicator composite replicating CNN Fear & Greed using fully public data: (1) VIX regime 20pts — EXTREME_FEAR/FEAR/NEUTRAL/GREED/EXTREME_GREED based on VIX level; (2) 52W high/low breadth 20pts — 50-ticker S&P 100 proxy, % near 52W highs vs lows net ratio; (3) safe haven demand 15pts — TLT vs SPY 30d relative return inverted; (4) put/call ratio 15pts — SPY nearest 30d expiry composite P/C inverted; (5) junk bond demand 15pts — HYG vs IEF 30d relative return; (6) market momentum 10pts — SPY vs 125-day moving average; (7) stock price breadth 5pts — RSP equal-weight vs SPY divergence; total score 0-100 with signal EXTREME_FEAR/FEAR/NEUTRAL/GREED/EXTREME_GREED and recommended action), economic indicators dashboard by country (macro health scorecard for 13 countries US/EU/JP/CN/KR/GB/CA/AU/IN/BR/MX/DE/FR — 5 components: growth proxy 25pts via equity ETF 1Y+3M return, inflation proxy 20pts via GLD+USO composite, employment/activity 20pts via XLY vs XLP discretionary-vs-staples, fiscal/credit health 20pts via HYG vs IEF credit spread + VIX adjustment, currency/external 15pts via country currency ETF 1Y return; composite score 0-100 with regime STRONG/HEALTHY/MIXED/WEAK/DISTRESSED and asset allocation signal). Powered by ECB, Binance, CoinGecko, World Bank, FRED, SEC EDGAR, Treasury.gov, federalreserve.gov, DefiLlama, Yahoo Finance.

eventPrices.title: Advanced analytics query
eventPrices.description: Portfolio analytics (volatility, Sharpe ratio, correlation), ETF backtesting, dividend analysis, sector rotation, stock fundamentals, earnings calendar, options chain (calls/puts/IV/OI), institutional holdings (13F top holders), analyst ratings + price targets + upgrades/downgrades, short interest (days-to-cover, squeeze risk), earnings surprise history (EPS beat/miss/in-line + beat rate), insider sentiment (Form 4 90-day net buying), currency carry trade analysis (rate differential + viability), stock screener (S&P 500 universe, filter by P/E / dividend / market cap / sector / price), unusual options flow (put/call volume ratio, smart money signals, top notional contracts), earnings call sentiment (keyword NLP on recent earnings news, POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/NEUTRAL score, guidance signal RAISED/LOWERED/MAINTAINED), sector momentum ranking (11 SPDR sector ETFs ranked by N-day return, rotation signal RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/COMMODITY_LED/MIXED, vs SPY benchmark), earnings calendar sector screen (scans S&P 500 proxy universe for upcoming earnings in the next 1-30 days by sector: earnings date, days_until_earnings, timing window EARNINGS_TODAY/IMMINENT_CATALYST/THIS_WEEK/NEXT_TWO_WEEKS/UPCOMING, forward EPS estimate, historical beat rate %, avg EPS surprise %, beat signal STRONG_BEAT_HISTORY/MILD_BEAT_HISTORY/NEUTRAL_HISTORY/MISS_TENDENCY, implied expected move % based on realized vol ×1.5 earnings premium, pre-earnings 5-day price drift %, sector summary, high-confidence beat plays list beat_rate ≥70% + avg_surprise ≥5%, miss risk watch list, imminent catalysts ≤3 days, strategy guide for straddle/iron condor/directional/IV crush), alpha factor composite per ticker (multi-factor alpha scoring across 4 dimensions, each 25 pts max = 100 total: (1) Momentum 25pts — 12-1 classic momentum factor (12M return minus 1M return) × 50% + 3M return × 30% + 6M return × 20%, composite momentum score with MA50/MA200 trend bonus, signal STRONG_MOMENTUM_LEADER/POSITIVE_MOMENTUM/MILD_MOMENTUM/NEUTRAL_MOMENTUM/NEGATIVE_MOMENTUM/STRONG_MOMENTUM_LAGGARD + ABOVE_BOTH_MAS_UPTREND/SHORT_TERM_UPTREND/LONG_TERM_TREND_INTACT/BELOW_BOTH_MAS_DOWNTREND; (2) Quality 25pts — ROE sub-score 10pts (≥20%=10/≥15%=8/≥10%=6/≥0%=3/negative=0), profit margin sub-score 8pts (≥20%=8/≥10%=6/≥5%=4), balance sheet strength 7pts (D/E ratio + current ratio composite); (3) Value 25pts — P/E vs sector benchmark PE 10pts (ratio ≤0.6=10 DEEPLY_CHEAP/≤0.85=8/≤1.15=6/≤1.5=3/>1.5=1), P/B ratio 7pts (≤1.0=7 DEEP_VALUE_PB/≤2.0=5/≤4.0=3), EV/EBITDA 8pts (≤8=8 DEEP_VALUE_EV/≤12=6/≤18=4/≤25=2); (4) Growth 25pts — revenue growth YoY 12pts (≥25%=12 HYPERGROWTH/≥15%=10/≥8%=8/≥3%=5/≥0%=2/negative=0) + earnings growth 13pts (≥30%=13/≥20%=11/≥10%=8/≥0%=5/negative=1; fallback forward vs trailing EPS if yoy unavailable); composite signal EXCEPTIONAL_ALPHA_CANDIDATE ≥85/STRONG_ALPHA_CANDIDATE ≥70/MODERATE_ALPHA_CANDIDATE ≥55/WEAK_ALPHA_CANDIDATE ≥40/AVOID <40; dominant and weakest factor identified; factor ranking by normalized score), commodity correlation matrix (Gold/Silver/Oil/Copper/Wheat/NatGas × SPY/TLT/DXY Pearson correlation, commodity cycle regime RISK_ON/INFLATION_HEDGE/DEFLATION_RISK/MIXED, configurable 30-252 day window), earnings whisper analysis (4-quarter EPS actual vs estimate, BEAT/MISS/IN_LINE classification, post-earnings price reaction 1D, beat rate, whisper gap signal STRONG_BEAT_TENDENCY/MILD_BEAT_TENDENCY/NEUTRAL/STRONG_MISS_TENDENCY), factor exposure analysis (Fama-French 5-factor OLS regression: Market/Size/Value/Momentum/Quality ETF proxies, factor betas, R-squared, rolling 63-day correlations, dominant factor, tilt signal HIGH_BETA/LOW_BETA/SMALL_CAP_TILT/LARGE_CAP_TILT/VALUE_TILT/GROWTH_TILT/MOMENTUM_TILT/QUALITY_TILT), earnings season tracker (S&P 500 proxy 60-ticker beat/miss/in-line rates, avg EPS surprise %, sector-level breakdown, beat signal vs 74% historical avg, top beats/misses), dividend calendar (80 S&P 500 dividend payers across 11 sectors: upcoming ex-div dates within 60 days, annual yield, trailing yield, 5yr avg yield comparison, payout ratio safety signal SAFE/MODERATE/HIGH_PAYOUT, dividend growth YoY%, highest yielders, fastest growing dividends, sector yield summary), insider trading radar (SEC Form 4 cluster buy scanner: 165 S&P 500 stocks across 11 sectors, STRONG_ACCUMULATION signal for 3+ insider buys in 30 days with net value > $500K, sector summary of total insider buy flow, sorted by accumulation strength), sector rotation signal (11 SPDR sector ETFs scored by relative performance vs SPY: 1M×40% + 3M×35% + 6M×25% weighted composite, OVERWEIGHT/NEUTRAL/UNDERWEIGHT positioning, DEFENSIVE_ROTATION/CYCLICAL_ROTATION/VALUE_ROTATION/MIXED_ROTATION regime, macro overlay with VIX and 10Y yield context), earnings revision tracker per ticker (analyst upgrade/downgrade momentum over 30d/90d windows, revision signal RISING/FALLING/STABLE, EPS estimate current-quarter and next-year growth %, consensus price target with upside %, recent 5 analyst actions with firm + grade change, recommendation mean 1-5 scale with label STRONG_BUY/BUY/HOLD/SELL/STRONG_SELL), short squeeze radar (scans 60+ high-short-interest stocks: composite squeeze_score 0-100 from short % of float × 40 + 1W price momentum × 30 + volume surge ratio × 30, squeeze_risk EXTREME/HIGH/MODERATE/LOW, days-to-cover, 1W/1M momentum, 5d/20d volume surge ratio, top-15 candidates ranked by score, extreme alerts list), institutional flow tracker (120+ S&P 500 stocks across 11 sectors: institutional ownership % from yfinance major_holders, top institutional holder and stake %, 3M price momentum, 10d/20d volume surge ratio, heuristic flow signal STRONG_ACCUMULATION/ACCUMULATION/NEUTRAL/DISTRIBUTION/STRONG_DISTRIBUTION, sector-level aggregation SECTOR_ACCUMULATION/MILD_ACCUMULATION/NEUTRAL/MILD_DISTRIBUTION, overall market flow signal INSTITUTIONAL_BUY_PRESSURE/INSTITUTIONAL_SELL_PRESSURE/BALANCED_FLOWS, top 15 accumulation + top 10 distribution candidates, sector filter supported), smart money composite per ticker (aggregates 5 signals: OBV divergence dark pool proxy 25pts + institutional ownership % 20pts + Form 4 insider transactions 90d 25pts + short interest / squeeze risk 15pts + options put/call ratio sentiment 15pts = SMART_MONEY_SCORE 0-100, final signal STRONG_SMART_MONEY_BUY/SMART_MONEY_BUY/NEUTRAL/SMART_MONEY_SELL/STRONG_SMART_MONEY_SELL, full score breakdown with per-component signal label), earnings surprise vs sector per ticker (compares ticker EPS surprise avg % and beat rate vs sector peer average using 10-15 representative S&P 500 peers, signal SECTOR_OUTPERFORMER/IN_LINE/SECTOR_UNDERPERFORMER with strength STRONG/MODERATE/MILD, trend IMPROVING/STABLE/DECLINING, quarterly breakdown 4 most recent quarters, beat rate diff vs sector), options IV percentile per ticker (compares current ATM implied volatility or 30d realized vol proxy against 1-year historical IV distribution — IV percentile rank 0-100 = % of past days below current IV, IV rank = position within 52-week range, signal IV_ELEVATED/IV_NORMAL/IV_DEPRESSED with SELL_PREMIUM/NEUTRAL/BUY_PREMIUM strategy recommendation, signal strength HIGH/MODERATE/NEUTRAL, historical RV stats: current 30d / 3m avg / 6m avg / 1y avg / min / max), earnings date countdown per ticker (fetches next earnings date from yfinance calendar, calculates days_until_earnings, timing_signal EARNINGS_PASSED_OR_TODAY/IMMEDIATE_PLAY/PRIME_ENTRY_WINDOW/EARLY_ENTRY/WATCH_LIST/TOO_EARLY, options-based expected move from ATM straddle cost/spot %, historical 4-quarter EPS beat/miss with surprise %, beat rate %, avg surprise %, 5-day pre-earnings price drift pattern avg, earnings_tendency STRONG_BEAT_TENDENCY/MILD_BEAT_TENDENCY/NEUTRAL/STRONG_MISS_TENDENCY/MILD_MISS_TENDENCY, full strategy guide: straddle entry timing / iron condor setup / directional trade bias / IV crush risk warning), relative strength ranking for custom ticker list (accepts up to 20 comma-separated tickers, calculates 1W/1M/3M/6M price returns + RS score vs SPY for each ticker, composite momentum score weighted 1W×20%+1M×30%+3M×30%+6M×20%, RS composite = weighted excess return vs SPY per period, momentum regime STRONG_OUTPERFORMER/OUTPERFORMER/NEUTRAL/UNDERPERFORMER/STRONG_UNDERPERFORMER, full ranked table + top-5 momentum leaders + bottom-5 laggards, market context signal BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET/SIDEWAYS, strategy guide with long candidates / avoid or short / rotation signal based on sector shift in top performers), momentum factor screen for S&P 500 universe (screens 140+ tickers across 11 sectors using classic 12-1 momentum factor: 12-month return minus 1-month return, classifies stocks as HIGH_MOMENTUM/NEUTRAL_MOMENTUM/LOW_MOMENTUM quintiles, sector-level avg momentum ranking with LEADING/OUTPERFORMING/NEUTRAL/UNDERPERFORMING/LAGGING labels, market-wide regime STRONG_MOMENTUM_MARKET/MOMENTUM_MARKET/MIXED_MOMENTUM/WEAK_MOMENTUM/MOMENTUM_CRASH, top-N and bottom-N momentum stocks with full return breakdown 1W/1M/3M/6M/12M, strategy guide for long/short/mean-reversion plays), earnings quality scorecard per ticker (4-component scoring: (1) cash flow quality 30pts — accruals ratio = (NI - OCF)/avg_assets, EXCELLENT_CASH_BACKING/STRONG_CASH_BACKING/MODERATE/WEAK/ACCRUAL_WARNING; (2) earnings persistence 25pts — coefficient of variation of 4-year net income + trend IMPROVING/STABLE_POSITIVE/DECLINING/VOLATILE = HIGHLY_PERSISTENT/MODERATELY_PERSISTENT/LOW_PERSISTENCE/ERRATIC; (3) revenue growth 25pts — YoY and 3-year revenue CAGR, STRONG_REVENUE_GROWTH/HEALTHY_GROWTH/MODERATE_GROWTH/FLAT_REVENUE/REVENUE_DECLINING; (4) ROE quality 20pts — returnOnEquity from yfinance, EXCELLENT_ROE/STRONG_ROE/MODERATE_ROE/LOW_ROE/NEGATIVE_ROE; composite score 0-100 with signal HIGH_QUALITY/MODERATE_QUALITY/LOW_QUALITY/VERY_LOW_QUALITY), dividend safety screen (scans 80+ S&P 500 dividend payers across 9 sectors: 4-component safety scorecard — payout ratio 30pts: ≤40% VERY_LOW/≤60% SUSTAINABLE/≤75% ELEVATED/≤90% HIGH/>110% UNSUSTAINABLE; FCF coverage ratio 35pts: FCF-per-share / annual dividend rate ≥3x EXCELLENT/≥2x STRONG/≥1.3x ADEQUATE/<0.7x FCF_DEFICIT_RISK; yield quality 20pts: 1.5-4% ATTRACTIVE/4-6% HIGH_YIELD_WATCH/>6% YIELD_TRAP_RISK; beta stability 15pts; composite score 0-100 → SAFE_DIVIDEND ≥65 / AT_RISK 40-64 / DIVIDEND_CUT_RISK <40; top-10 safe picks, at-risk watch list, high-risk names, sector safety ranking sorted by safety rate %; optional sector filter: Technology/Financials/Healthcare/ConsumerStaples/Utilities/Energy/Industrials/RealEstate/Materials), valuation composite scorecard per ticker (5-component multi-factor valuation: P/E vs sector average 25pts — trailing or forward PE divided by sector benchmark DEEPLY_CHEAP_VS_SECTOR/CHEAP/IN_LINE/EXPENSIVE/SIGNIFICANTLY_EXPENSIVE; P/B vs sector average 20pts — DEEP_VALUE_PB/VALUE_PB/FAIR_PB/ELEVATED_PB/EXPENSIVE_PB; EV/EBITDA vs sector average 20pts — DEEP_VALUE_EV/CHEAP_EV/FAIR_EV/ELEVATED_EV/EXPENSIVE_EV; PEG ratio 15pts — ≤0.8 GROWTH_AT_DISCOUNT/≤1.2 FAIR_GROWTH_PRICE/>2.0 GROWTH_OVERPRICED; DCF proxy 20pts — 10-year FCF projection with growth rate capped at 30%, 9%+ discount rate adjusted for beta, 2.5% terminal growth → DCF implied price vs current price upside %; composite 0-100 → DEEPLY_UNDERVALUED ≥72/UNDERVALUED ≥55/FAIRLY_VALUED ≥38/OVERVALUED ≥22/SIGNIFICANTLY_OVERVALUED <22 with action guidance STRONG_BUY_ZONE/BUY_ZONE/HOLD/TRIM_OR_AVOID/AVOID; sector PE/PB/EV benchmarks built-in for Technology/Healthcare/Financials/ConsumerDiscretionary/ConsumerStaples/Industrials/Energy/Materials/Utilities/RealEstate/CommunicationServices), earnings growth tracker per ticker (tracks EPS and Revenue YoY growth rates across last 4 quarters — quarterly EPS actual from earnings_history, quarterly revenue from income statement; calculates YoY growth % per quarter; detects acceleration/deceleration by comparing recent 2Q avg growth vs prior 2Q avg growth (delta); composite score 0-100 = EPS score×60% + Revenue score×40%; growth regime classification ACCELERATING_GROWTH (delta>3% & recent>0%) / STEADY_GROWTH (|delta|≤5% & avg>5%) / DECELERATING (delta<-5%) / STALLING (avg<0%) / DECLINING (avg<-10%); composite signal STRONG_GROWTH_ACCELERATION/HEALTHY_GROWTH/MIXED_GROWTH/WEAKENING_GROWTH/GROWTH_CONCERN; strategy guidance for GARP screening), liquidity score per ticker (composite 0-100 liquidity assessment for position sizing: market cap tier 30pts — MEGA_CAP ≥$200B/LARGE_CAP ≥$10B/MID_CAP ≥$2B/SMALL_CAP ≥$300M/MICRO_CAP; avg daily dollar volume 30d 35pts — ULTRA_HIGH ≥$1B/HIGH ≥$100M/MODERATE ≥$10M/LOW ≥$1M/VERY_LOW; Amihud illiquidity ratio 20pts — mean(|daily log return|/dollar volume) ×1e9 bps, HIGHLY_LIQUID_AMIHUD <0.1/LIQUID <1.0/MODERATE <5.0/ILLIQUID <20.0/VERY_ILLIQUID; bid-ask spread proxy 15pts — 30d realized vol ×0.003 as rough spread estimate; signal HIGHLY_LIQUID ≥80/LIQUID ≥60/MODERATE ≥40/ILLIQUID ≥20/VERY_ILLIQUID <20; position sizing guidance with easy entry/exit size estimate in $M; volume trend VOLUME_SURGE/ABOVE_AVERAGE/NORMAL/BELOW_AVERAGE/VOLUME_DRY_UP), quality factor screen for S&P 500 universe (screens 150-ticker S&P 500 proxy across 11 sectors using a 5-component quality scorecard: ROE quality 25pts — ≥20%=25/≥15%=20/≥10%=14/≥0%=6/negative=0; debt/equity safety 25pts — D/E ≤0.3=25/≤0.6=20/≤1.0=14/≤2.0=6/>2.0=0; EPS growth CAGR 20pts — ≥20%=20/≥12%=16/≥6%=11/≥0%=5/negative=0; FCF margin 20pts — ≥20%=20/≥12%=16/≥6%=11/≥0%=5/negative=0; earnings stability 10pts — quarterly NI positive rate ≥90%=10/≥75%=8/≥60%=5/≥40%=2; composite 0-100 → QUALITY_ELITE ≥85/QUALITY_SOLID ≥65/QUALITY_MIXED ≥40/LOW_QUALITY <40; top-N quality picks, QUALITY_ELITE names list, lowest quality candidates, sector concentration in top-N, market quality signal HIGH_QUALITY_MARKET/MIXED_QUALITY_MARKET/LOW_QUALITY_MARKET), capital allocation scorecard per ticker (assesses management capital efficiency across 5 components: buyback yield 25pts — repurchase cash / market cap ≥5%=25/≥3%=20/≥1%=14/≥0.1%=8, or shares outstanding YoY shrinkage proxy; dividend growth consistency 20pts — YoY DPS growth ≥8% + payout ≤60%=20/≥4%+≤70%=16; FCF reinvestment ratio 20pts — capex/FCF, optimal range 0.20-0.60=20 balanced/too low or too high penalized; M&A discipline via goodwill/assets 20pts — ≤5%=20 organic grower/≤15%=16/≤30%=11/≤50%=6/>50%=2, rapid goodwill growth penalty; ROIC proxy 15pts — net income / invested capital (equity + debt) ≥20%=15/≥15%=12/≥10%=9/≥5%=5; composite 0-100 → EXCELLENT_CAPITAL_ALLOCATOR ≥80/GOOD_ALLOCATOR ≥60/MIXED_ALLOCATOR ≥40/POOR_ALLOCATOR <40 with action guidance), management quality scorecard per ticker (5-component management assessment: CEO tenure proxy 10pts neutral — public data limitation; ROE trend 25pts — historical 3-4yr ROE from financials + trend IMPROVING adds +5pts/DECLINING subtracts -3pts; R&D efficiency 20pts — R&D/revenue intensity scored relative to gross margin tier, high-margin sectors require 8-15%+ R&D to score HEALTHY_RD; SBC discipline 20pts — stock-based compensation / revenue ≤1%=20 MINIMAL_DILUTION / ≤2%=18 / ≤4%=14 / ≤8%=8 / >8%=3 HIGH_DILUTION_RISK; operating margin stability 15pts — coefficient of variation of 4-year operating margins, CV ≤10% + positive = HIGHLY_STABLE=15pts/CV ≤20%=STABLE=12pts; composite score 0-90 → EXCELLENT_MANAGEMENT ≥75/GOOD_MANAGEMENT ≥58/MIXED_MANAGEMENT ≥40/POOR_MANAGEMENT <40 with action guidance), competitive moat scorecard per ticker (5-component moat width assessment: gross margin stability 25pts — 5-year average gross margin × coefficient of variation, ELITE_MARGIN_FORTRESS ≥60% stable CV ≤10%=25/STRONG_PRICING_POWER ≥50% CV ≤15%=22/HEALTHY_MOAT ≥40%=18/THIN_MARGINS ≥20%=8/COMMODITIZED=3, EXPANDING trend +2pts/CONTRACTING -3pts; operating leverage 20pts — YoY operating income growth / revenue growth ratio ≥3x=20 HIGH_OPERATING_LEVERAGE/≥1.5x=17 POSITIVE/≥0.8x=13 PROPORTIONAL/<0=3 NEGATIVE; pricing power proxy 20pts — current gross margin vs 3-5yr average delta >5pp=20 STRONG_PRICING_POWER/STABLE_PRICING=13/MARGIN_PRESSURE=8/SIGNIFICANT_MARGIN_EROSION=3; market position 15pts — mega-cap ≥$200B=15 DOMINANT_MARKET_POSITION/large-cap ≥$50B with revenue growth modifiers/mid-cap ≥$10B; R&D IP moat 20pts — R&D intensity × gross margin quality composite ≥0.15=20 DEEP_IP_MOAT/≥0.08=17/≥0.04=13/NON_RD_SECTOR special handling; total 0-100 → WIDE_MOAT ≥78/NARROW_MOAT ≥58/NO_MOAT ≥38/STRUCTURAL_DISADVANTAGE <38 with action guidance), earnings revision momentum per ticker (analyst EPS revision momentum tracker: scans upgrade/downgrade history over 30/60/90-day sliding windows, calculates weighted revision score = 30d window×50% + 60d incremental×30% + 90d incremental×20%, signal REVISION_MOMENTUM_STRONG ≥80 score/REVISION_MOMENTUM_POSITIVE ≥55/REVISION_MOMENTUM_NEUTRAL ≥35/REVISION_MOMENTUM_NEGATIVE ≥15/REVISION_DETERIORATING <15; per-window upgrade/downgrade counts and net; analyst coverage quality LOW_COVERAGE/MODERATE_COVERAGE/HIGH_COVERAGE; consensus signal STRONG_ANALYST_CONSENSUS_BUY/ANALYST_HOLD/ANALYST_CONSENSUS_SELL; forward and trailing EPS with YoY growth %; price targets mean/high/low with upside % to mean; recent 6 analyst actions with firm name, action, from/to grade; action guidance for each revision signal tier), peer comparison per ticker (ranks ticker vs 10-15 sector peers on 6 fundamental metrics: P/E ratio, P/B ratio, EV/EBITDA, ROE %, revenue growth %, gross margin %; computes percentile rank vs peer universe for each metric (0=worst, 100=best in peer group); composite percentile score from all 6 metrics; overall signal PREMIUM_TO_PEERS ≥75th pctile/MILD_PREMIUM ≥55/FAIR_VALUE_VS_PEERS ≥45/MILD_DISCOUNT ≥25/CHEAP_VS_PEERS <25; sector-median for each metric; strongest/weakest peers by composite fundamentals; sector peer universes defined for all 11 GICS sectors with 13-14 S&P 500 representative peers each; action guide per signal tier), macro sensitivity scorecard per ticker (4-component macro risk assessment: rate sensitivity 25pts — debt/equity ratio as leverage proxy ≤0.2=25 MINIMAL_LEVERAGE/≤0.5=20 LOW/≤1.0=14 MODERATE/≤2.0=7 HIGH_LEVERAGE/≥2.0=2 EXTREME_RATE_RISK + TLT correlation as duration proxy; dollar sensitivity 20pts — UUP (dollar ETF) 1-year correlation: negative corr = USD hurts revenue MULTINATIONAL_RISK/neutral = domestic/positive = USD_BENEFICIARY; inflation sensitivity 20pts — gross margin ≥60%=16 HIGH_MARGIN_PRICING_POWER/≥35%=12 MODERATE/≥15%=7 THIN_MARGIN/Energy+Materials sectors = INFLATION_BENEFICIARY=18pts + gold/oil correlation context; economic cycle sensitivity 35pts — 1-year OLS beta vs SPY ≥1.5=5 VERY_HIGH_BETA/≥1.2=10 HIGH/≥0.9=20 MARKET/≥0.6=28 LOW/≤0.6=35 HIGHLY_DEFENSIVE + XLY vs XLU correlation spread for cyclicality bias STRONGLY_CYCLICAL/MILDLY_CYCLICAL/NEUTRAL/MILDLY_DEFENSIVE/STRONGLY_DEFENSIVE; composite score 0-100 → LOW_MACRO_SENSITIVITY ≥75/MODERATE_LOW ≥58/MODERATE ≥42/HIGH_MACRO_SENSITIVITY ≥28/EXTREME_MACRO_SENSITIVITY <28; risk factors list identifies specific vulnerabilities; action guide per sensitivity level), sector fundamental heatmap (11-sector cross-sector valuation and quality matrix: computes median P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA, ROE %, revenue growth %, net profit margin % for each of 11 GICS sectors using 6 representative S&P 500 stocks per sector; ranks sectors by composite attractiveness score 0-100 derived from valuation sub-score 45% — lower P/E × 40% + lower P/B × 30% + lower EV/EBITDA × 30% — and quality+growth sub-score 55% — higher ROE × 40% + higher net margin × 30% + higher revenue growth × 30%; attractiveness labels HIGHLY_ATTRACTIVE ≥75/ATTRACTIVE ≥58/NEUTRAL ≥42/UNATTRACTIVE ≥25/AVOID_SECTOR; ranked sector list with overweight/underweight strategy guide; highlights best_value_sector by lowest median P/E, best_growth_sector by highest median revenue growth, best_profitability_sector by highest median ROE; rotation signal based on relative attractiveness), technical strength scorecard per ticker (5-component technical analysis scoring 0-100: trend 30pts — price vs MA20/MA50/MA200 position: above all 3=20pts/above MA20+MA50=15pts/above MA50 only=8pts/above MA20 only=5pts, MA alignment BULLISH=+10pts when MA20>MA50>MA200/BEARISH=0pts/MIXED=+5pts; momentum 25pts — RSI-14 scored 50-70=15pts BULLISH_ZONE/above-70=10pts OVERBOUGHT/40-50=8pts NEUTRAL_LOW/below-30=12pts OVERSOLD_REVERSAL_WATCH plus MACD: bullish crossover=10pts/above signal=7pts/positive territory=5pts/momentum_improving=3pts/bearish=0pts; Bollinger Band position 15pts — price in 40-75% B%=15 BULLISH_BB_ZONE/near upper=8pts/near mid=8pts/near lower oversold watch=10pts/extreme=5pts; volume confirmation 15pts — price rising + volume rising=15pts BULLISH_VOLUME_CONFIRMATION/price up + low vol=8pts WEAK/high vol + price down=3pts DISTRIBUTION/neutral=6pts; 52-week range position 15pts — ≥75% of range=15pts NEAR_52W_HIGH_MOMENTUM/≥55%=12pts UPPER_HALF/≥40%=8pts MID_RANGE/≥25%=5pts LOWER_HALF/<25%=2pts NEAR_52W_LOW_WEAKNESS; composite signal STRONG_BUY_TECHNICAL ≥82/BULLISH_TECHNICAL ≥65/NEUTRAL_TECHNICAL ≥50/BEARISH_TECHNICAL ≥35/STRONG_SELL_TECHNICAL <35; key price levels: MA20/50/200/BB_upper/BB_lower/52W_high/52W_low; per-component breakdown with signal labels and scores), price target tracker per ticker (detailed analyst price target analysis: consensus mean/median/high/low price targets vs current price, upside % to mean/high/low, upside signal STRONG_UPSIDE_POTENTIAL ≥30%/MODERATE_UPSIDE ≥15%/MILD_UPSIDE ≥5%/FAIRLY_PRICED_AT_TARGET ≥-5%/ABOVE_CONSENSUS_TARGET, analyst consensus width — target range width % as conviction proxy HIGH_CONSENSUS ≤15%/MODERATE_CONSENSUS ≤30%/LOW_CONSENSUS ≤50%/VERY_WIDE_DISPERSION, recommendation mean score 1-5 label STRONG_BUY/BUY/HOLD/SELL/STRONG_SELL, target trend from 30/90-day upgrade/downgrade ratios — TARGETS_RISING/MILDLY_POSITIVE/STABLE_MIXED/TARGETS_FALLING, upgrade activity breakdown last 30d and 90d with upgrade ratio, recent analyst actions list with firm name, action, from/to grade; action guide per signal tier), sector momentum vs SPY (11 SPDR sector ETFs relative performance analysis over configurable N days — default 63 days / ~1 quarter: each sector absolute return %, excess return vs SPY in basis points (RS), half-period RS for acceleration detection, acceleration signal per sector ACCELERATING_OUTPERFORM/MILDLY_ACCELERATING/STABLE/MILDLY_DECELERATING/DECELERATING, RS signal STRONG_OUTPERFORMER ≥8pp/OUTPERFORMER ≥3pp/MARKET_PERFORMER ±3pp/UNDERPERFORMER ≥-8pp/STRONG_UNDERPERFORMER, sector rankings by RS, top-3 outperformers and underperformers, cycle regime from cyclical vs defensive RS spread — STRONG_RISK_ON_CYCLICAL/MILD_CYCLICAL_BIAS/MIXED_ROTATION/MILD_DEFENSIVE_TILT/STRONG_DEFENSIVE_RISK_OFF, market context STRONG_BULL/MILD_BULL/SIDEWAYS/MILD_BEAR/BEAR_MARKET, SPY period and half-period returns, strategy guide for overweight/underweight positioning), short interest trend per ticker (short % of float HEAVILY_SHORTED ≥30%/HIGH_SHORT_INTEREST ≥15%/MODERATE ≥5%/LOW ≥2%/MINIMAL, MoM shares short change % STRONG_SHORT_BUILDING ≥+15%/SHORT_BUILDING ≥+5%/STABLE/SHORT_COVERING ≥-15%/STRONG_SHORT_COVERING, days-to-cover EXTREME_DAYS_TO_COVER_SQUEEZE_RISK ≥10/HIGH ≥5/MODERATE ≥2/LOW, composite squeeze score 0-100 = short float pts 40 + DTC pts 35 + MoM trend pts 15 + beta pts 10, squeeze risk EXTREME_SQUEEZE_RISK ≥75/HIGH_SQUEEZE_RISK ≥55/MODERATE_SQUEEZE_RISK ≥35/LOW_SQUEEZE_RISK), options max pain per ticker (calculates total dollar pain for each candidate strike as sum of ITM call losses + ITM put losses weighted by open interest × 100, max pain strike = minimum total pain point, analyzes up to 3 nearest expirations within 45 DTE and ±30% spot range filter, distance signal MAX_PAIN_ABOVE_CURRENT_BULLISH_PULL ≥+3%/MAX_PAIN_BELOW_CURRENT_BEARISH_PULL ≤-3%/NEAR_MAX_PAIN_SIDEWAYS_PRESSURE, pin risk HIGH_PIN_RISK ≤2% distance/MODERATE_PIN_RISK ≤5%/LOW_PIN_RISK, total pain at max pain in USD, total call and put open interest totals, P/C OI ratio, lowest-pain strikes top-5, strategy guide for iron condor vs directional positioning).

eventPrices.title: Premium analytics query
eventPrices.description: High-depth options analytics: implied volatility surface (IV by expiry x strike), ATM IV term structure (short/mid/long-term), volatility skew (PUT_SKEW/CALL_SKEW/FLAT), OTM put vs call IV differential. Options skew monitor for SPY/QQQ/IWM: 25-delta proxy skew (OTM put IV minus OTM call IV at ~5% distance), ATM IV, put-call IV ratio, skew regime (ELEVATED_TAIL_RISK/COMPLACENT/NORMAL), composite cross-index signal. Options IV term structure per ticker: ATM IV across 30/60/90/120/180/360-day buckets, CONTANGO/BACKWARDATION/FLAT slope, VIX comparison (idiosyncratic vs market risk), vol risk premium (IV minus 30d realized vol — RICH/CHEAP/FAIR). FX volatility (12 currency pairs, realized vol 10/30/60/252d, vol regime VERY_LOW to HIGH). Options Gamma Exposure / GEX per ticker: Black-Scholes gamma × open interest × contract multiplier aggregated by strike, net GEX = call GEX - put GEX, GEX flip point (price where dealer gamma crosses zero), POSITIVE_GEX (price-stabilizing, mean-reversion) vs NEGATIVE_GEX (price-amplifying, momentum), top 10 gamma strikes by concentration, gamma wall, top-3 concentration %, near-term expiries ≤60 DTE. Put/call ratio history per ticker: composite P/C ratio from volume and open interest across up to 6 expirations (7-90 DTE), contrarian signal BULLISH_EXTREME/BEARISH_EXTREME/ELEVATED_FEAR/ELEVATED_COMPLACENCY/NEUTRAL, fear/greed proxy score 0-100, P/C trend across expirations NEAR_TERM_FEAR/LONG_TERM_FEAR/FLAT_STRUCTURE, OI signal HEAVY_PUT_OI/PUT_LEANING/CALL_LEANING/HEAVY_CALL_OI, benchmark context for index ETFs vs individual stocks. Dark pool indicator per ticker: OBV divergence analysis (BULLISH_DIVERGENCE = price falling but OBV rising = hidden institutional buying), 20-day VWAP calculation + price vs VWAP delta %, block trade proxy detection (high volume ≥1.8× 30d avg + tight daily range ≤1.5% = institutional block order), Accumulation/Distribution line 10-day trend, volume climax detection, composite dark pool signal STEALTH_ACCUMULATION/STEALTH_DISTRIBUTION/BLOCK_BUYING/BLOCK_SELLING/NO_SIGNAL with bullish/bearish confidence points. Options unusual activity scanner (market-wide): scans 100-ticker S&P 500 universe for unusual options sweeps, volume/OI ratio filter (default 3×), detects UNUSUAL_CALL_SWEEP/UNUSUAL_PUT_SWEEP signals, ranks by notional USD, market bias signal BULLISH_SWEEP_DOMINANCE/BEARISH_SWEEP_DOMINANCE/MILD_CALL_LEAN/MILD_PUT_LEAN/BALANCED_UNUSUAL_FLOW. Options flow heatmap (sector-wide): scans 44 representative tickers across 11 GICS sectors, aggregates put/call ratio + unusual sweep counts per sector, sector-level flow signal STRONG_BULLISH/BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH/STRONG_BEARISH, overall market flow regime BROAD_BULLISH_FLOW/MODERATE_BULLISH_FLOW/MIXED_FLOW/MODERATE_BEARISH_FLOW/BROAD_BEARISH_FLOW, most bullish and bearish sectors ranked. Business cycle positioning (detects current macro cycle phase using 4 real-time ETF proxies: PMI proxy 30pts — XLY+XLI+XLB cyclical 3M return vs XLP+XLU+XLV defensive 3M return spread ≥8pp=EXPANSION_CONFIRMED/≥3pp=EXPANSION_EARLY/neutral/-6pp=CONTRACTION_SIGNAL/<-6pp=RECESSION_SIGNAL; rate environment 25pts — TLT 3M return as falling/rising rates proxy; credit spread proxy 25pts — HYG vs LQD 3M relative return ≥3pp=RISK_ON_CREDIT_TIGHTENING/CREDIT_STABLE/MILD_CREDIT_WIDENING/CREDIT_STRESS_WIDENING; earnings/market momentum 20pts — SPY+QQQ avg 3M return; composite 0-100 → EARLY_CYCLE ≥60/MID_CYCLE ≥78/LATE_CYCLE ≥40/SLOWDOWN ≥22/RECESSION <22; for each phase: overweight/neutral/underweight sector recommendations with rationale; optional sector input for single-sector positioning signal OVERWEIGHT/NEUTRAL/UNDERWEIGHT; full ETF return data included). Market internals dashboard (S&P 500 100-stock proxy universe, 12 parallel threads): Advance/Decline proxy — 10d advance/decline counts and ratio STRONG_ADVANCE/ADVANCE/NEUTRAL/DECLINE/STRONG_DECLINE; New Highs/Lows — stocks near 52W high/low within 3% threshold, net % and nh/nl ratio signal; % above MA50 and MA200 — breadth signals STRONG_BREADTH/HEALTHY_BREADTH/NEUTRAL_BREADTH/WEAK_BREADTH/OVERSOLD_BREADTH and LONG_TERM_BULL/BULL_TREND/TRANSITION/BEAR_TREND/LONG_TERM_BEAR; McClellan Oscillator proxy — 10d vs 30d advance-decline breadth differential, OVERBOUGHT/POSITIVE_MOMENTUM/NEUTRAL/NEGATIVE_MOMENTUM/OVERSOLD; Bullish Percent Index proxy — % above 200d MA as BPI, OVERBOUGHT_ZONE/BULL_CONFIRMED/NEUTRAL_ZONE/BEAR_CONFIRMED/OVERSOLD_ZONE; composite health score 0-100 → HEALTHY/NEUTRAL/DETERIORATING/OVERSOLD/VERY_OVERSOLD with action guidance. Source: Yahoo Finance options chain and OHLCV (free, no API key).
